Amplify ETFs Launches the Amplify Solana 3% Monthly Option Income ETF (SOLM)

overview.description: The Amplify Solana 3% Monthly Option Income ETF (SOLM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long sol, short usd currency. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds, seeking balanced high income and capital appreciation via a synthetic covered call strategy tied to the price return of Solana (SOL). The fund targets a 36% annualized option premium, using both standardized exchange-traded and FLEX options SOLM was launched on Nov 3, 2025 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
